articles.summary: 提出LongE2V方法，利用预训练视频扩散先验联合处理事件流重建、预测和帧插值。在长时域上保持稳定，生成高质量视频，优于回归和现有生成方法。

articles.summary: 提出SpectraReward无需训练奖励函数，将预训练MLLM转化为文本到图像生成的奖励模型。通过测量图像与文本的语义匹配度，实现零样本强化学习微调，提升生成对齐性。

articles.title: Trust Region Policy Distillation
articles.excerpt: Big goals are hard to achieve all at once; breaking them into small steps is wiser. articles.summary: 提出信任区域策略蒸馏（TOP-D），通过动态构建近端教师网络，将不稳定的在线策略蒸馏转化为稳定训练范式。分步学习目标，显著降低方差，提升收敛效率。

articles.title: KronQ: LLM Quantization via Kronecker-Factored Hessian

articles.summary: 提出KronQ量化方法，利用Kronecker分解Hessian矩阵构造更精确的量化目标。考虑输出通道间相关性，优于仅基于输入激活统计的GPTQ等二阶方法，在LLM上取得更低困惑度。

articles.title: AdvancedMathBench: A Benchmark Suite for Advanced Mathematical Proof Generation and Verification
articles.excerpt: Large language models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable performance on high-school and olympiad-style mathematics, yet their capabilities on advanced mathematics remain poorly understood. Existing benchmarks, however, fall short in both scope and evaluation granularity: they provide limited disciplina
articles.summary: 提出AdvancedMathBench基准套件，评估LLM在高等数学定理证明与验证方面的能力。覆盖多个数学分支，提供细粒度评价，揭示现有LLM在高等数学上的局限。

articles.title: Enhancing In-context Panoramic Generation via Geometric-aware Pretraining
articles.excerpt: In this work, we present Canvas360, a two-stage framework for in-context panoramic generation that combines geometry-aware pretraining with downstream task-specific fine-tuning. articles.summary: 提出Canvas360两阶段框架，先进行几何感知预训练，再针对上下文全景生成任务微调。解决训练数据不足问题，提升全景图像生成的几何一致性与上下文保真度。

articles.title: Metacognition in LLMs: Foundations, Progress, and Opportunities

articles.summary: 综述LLM中的元认知能力：梳理理论基础、现有进展与未来机会。指出元认知对学习、问题解决与决策的重要性，并分析当前LLM在自我监控与反思方面的潜力与局限。

articles.title: Towards Mechanistically Understanding Why Memorized Knowledge Fails to Generalize in Large Language Model Finetuning
articles.excerpt: Fine-tuning LLMs to inject new knowledge faces a critical challenge: LLMs can quickly memorize new facts, yet fail to use them for downstream reasoning tasks. articles.summary: 形式化微调中“知而不用”的鸿沟（Knowing–Using Gap），表现为准确率滞后与时间延迟。通过机制分析揭示记忆与泛化分离的原因，并提出缓解策略。

articles.title: Remember When It Matters: Proactive Memory Agent for Long-Horizon Agents

articles.title: Proxy Exploration and Reusable Guidance: A Modular LLM Post-Training Paradigm via Proxy-Guided Update Signals

articles.title: Self-Guided Test-Time Training for Long-Context LLMs
